expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers highlight activation, persistence, deselection, and interaction safety for bar chart and heatmap
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the focus and enumerates required coverage for both visualizations: “Focus: Shipment checkpoint covers highlight activation, persistence, deselection, and interaction safety for bar chart and heatmap.” It then details “3.1 Bar chart — required highlight checkpoints” and “3.2 Heatmap — required highlight checkpoints”, each listing Activation, Persistence, Deselection, and Interaction safety.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly framed as Phase5b: title “VIZ-P5B-CHECKPOINT-001 — Phase5b Checkpoint (Advisory)”, includes “Primary phase/checkpoint under test: phase5b”, and a section “1) Scope & intent (Phase5b)” describing shipment-time highlight interaction verification consistent with a checkpoint.
